title: PlayStation heads towards a disc-free future amid controversy
summary: Sony limits the purchase of PS5 disc drives, disc production will stop in 2028, and criticism from companies, politicians, and consumers grows.

title: Chinese YMTC SSDs now installed in Lenovo laptops globally
summary: Manufacturers like Lenovo incorporate YMTC solid-state drives in their laptops, marking the entry of Chinese NAND memory into the international computer market.

title: Data centers under scrutiny for environmental pollution and new energy sources
summary: Meta suspends contaminated water discharges, Microsoft is sued for noise, CO2 emissions exceed estimates, and a startup proposes 3D printed nuclear reactors to power them.

title: Controversy grows around the use of artificial intelligence over copyright and unfair competition
summary: Musicians, creators and governments denounce the unauthorized use of works by AI, while companies like Apple and Meta defend their practices and lawsuits increase.

title: New processors and lightweight gaming laptops with RTX 5070 and Ryzen 7 dominate the market
summary: System76 and ThundeRobot launch laptops with RTX 5070, AMD introduces the Ryzen 7 8700G, Intel prepares Nova Lake, and AYANEO launches a Strix Halo handheld console.

title: New tools and resources for developers: AI cost optimization and programming techniques
summary: Tools like pxpipe appear to reduce AI token costs, along with prompt engineering tips, programming courses, and talks on concurrency.

title: Mistral launches Leanstral 1.5, an open-source model that dominates formal mathematics
summary: Mistral's AI model sets new records in mathematics benchmarks and detects real errors in code.

title: Microsoft accelerates its AI bet with Copilot and AutoPilot agents
summary: Microsoft develops an operating system focused on Copilot and joins the AI superapp race with its own intelligent agents.

title: Extreme heat waves affect the United States and Europe with blackouts, drought, and temperature records
summary: The US suffers massive blackouts and the removal of energy efficiency pages, while Europe faces the drop in the Rhine and record temperatures in Spain.

title: Multiple security vulnerabilities affect Linux, Android and embedded systems
summary: Flaws like Bad Epoll in Linux that allows privilege escalation are revealed, along with North Korean malware campaigns and file system holes for millions of devices.

title: RTX 5090 sparks controversy due to high prices and thermal dissipation problems
summary: RTX 5090 graphics cards reach prices of up to 6,499 euros, while cases of melting PCIe riser insulation in vertical configurations are reported.

title: High cost of housing in cities leads to empty offices and search for cheaper alternatives
summary: While Seattle faces empty office towers, the price of apartments in Madrid exceeds that of an island in Scotland.

title: The future of mobility: Airbus develops the A320 successor and Chevrolet struggles to sell its electric truck
summary: Airbus announces the launch of the eAction aircraft in 2030, while Chevrolet's electric truck fails to attract buyers in the United States.

title: Cryptocurrency and inequality: investors lose billions while millionaires increase their wealth
summary: Nearly one million investors lost $3.8 billion with Trump's cryptocurrency, while global millionaires increased their wealth by 25% in the last year.

title: Connectivity advances with XGS-PON WiFi 7 routers and Starlink antennas in Japanese hydrants
summary: Orange renews its router with 10 Gbps fiber and WiFi 7, while Japan tests hydrants with Starlink antennas to provide Wi-Fi during emergencies.

title: Enthusiasts revive classic consoles and create their own Steam Machines with modern components
summary: From a functional PS1 controller to a Dreamcast clone with Windows CE, fans keep retro technology alive with DIY projects.

title: New astronomical findings: Webb telescope baffles scientists and bacteria survive on Mars
summary: Webb telescope observations challenge current theories of the universe, while a study shows that bacteria can survive Martian conditions.

title: Technology and artificial intelligence transform the workplace and productivity
summary: Excel continues to dominate the web, YouTube worries creators with algorithm changes, and AI affects human relationships and learning.

title: OLED monitors and magnetic keyboards set trends in the gaming market
summary: OLED 1440p 240 Hz monitors reach IPS prices, while keyboards with Hall Effect switches gain popularity over mechanical ones.

title: Data leaks and privacy: from YouTube to requests for information to Telegram
summary: Leaks of private videos on YouTube are reported, possible cache leaks in workspaces, Verizon affects smartwatches, and India asks Telegram and Signal for explanations.
